metadata.description: Ready-to-submit CESGA script examples for API integration
metadata.note: Copy JSON objects directly to submit to /api/v1/jobs endpoint

payload.script_content:
#!/bin/bash
#SBATCH --job-name=alphafold2_prediction
#SBATCH --ntasks=1
#SBATCH --cpus-per-task=8
#SBATCH --mem=32G
#SBATCH --time=02:00:00
#SBATCH --partition=gpu
#SBATCH --gres=gpu:1
#SBATCH --output=alphafold_%j.out

module load CESGA/2023
module load python/3.10
module load cuda/11.8

cat > input_protein.fasta << 'EOF'
>sp|P69905|HBA_HUMAN hemoglobin subunit alpha
VLSPADKTNVKAAVDVWFEASPMFRAVFDAKYVMVQVSKLSQKFHVQDNCNLLLKVTKI
AYSVLSALRQQLQVKGHGVQVGIVGAKVQA
EOF

OUTPUT_DIR="/home/user/af2_results_$(date +%s)"
mkdir -p ${OUTPUT_DIR}

python -m alphafold2 --input_fasta=input_protein.fasta --output_dir=${OUTPUT_DIR} --max_template_date=2023-12-01

echo "AlphaFold2 completed"

#!/bin/bash
#SBATCH --job-name=blast_search
#SBATCH --ntasks=1
#SBATCH --cpus-per-task=16
#SBATCH --mem=32G
#SBATCH --time=01:30:00
#SBATCH --partition=cpu

module load CESGA/2023
module load blast/2.14.0

cat > query.fasta << 'EOF'
>unknown_protein
MVLSPADKTNVKAAVDVWFEASPMFRAVFDAKYVMVQVSKLSQKFHVQDNCNLLLKVTKI
AYSVLSALRQQLQVKGHGVQVGIVGAKVQA
EOF

psiblast -query query.fasta -db /databases/swissprot -num_iterations=3 -num_threads=16 -evalue=1e-5 -outfmt='6 qseqid sseqid pident evalue' -out blast_results.txt

echo "BLAST search completed"

#!/bin/bash
#SBATCH --job-name=msa
#SBATCH --ntasks=1
#SBATCH --cpus-per-task=12
#SBATCH --mem=16G
#SBATCH --time=01:00:00
#SBATCH --partition=cpu

module load CESGA/2023
module load mafft/7.515

cat > proteins.fasta << 'EOF'
>human_ubiquitin
MQIFVKTLTGKTITLEVESPDTIENVALVENAKAKTLVKILSQDPEAGSFSQRNETAVKQ
>mouse_ubiquitin
MQIFVKALTGKTITLEVESPDTIENVALVENAKAKTLVKILSQDPEAGSFSQRNETAVKQ
>yeast_ubiquitin
MQTFTAATLEVVAPVNGKTVTVEKPTKTEVTAEVALTAVK
EOF

mafft --auto --thread=-1 proteins.fasta > msa_results.fasta

esl-reformat stockholm msa_results.fasta > msa_results.sto
echo "MSA completed"

#!/bin/bash
#SBATCH --job-name=md_gromacs
#SBATCH --ntasks=1
#SBATCH --cpus-per-task=8
#SBATCH --mem=64G
#SBATCH --time=04:00:00
#SBATCH --partition=gpu
#SBATCH --gres=gpu:2

module load CESGA/2023
module load gromacs/2023.1
module load cuda/11.8

WORKDIR=$(pwd)
echo "[$(date)] Starting MD simulation in ${WORKDIR}"

gmx pdb2gmx -f lysozyme.pdb -o lysozyme.gro -p topol.top -ff amber99sb-ildn -water tip3p -ignh

echo "Energy minimization..."
gmx grompp -f minim.mdp -c lysozyme.gro -p topol.top -o em.tpr
gmx mdrun -deffnm em -v -c em.gro

echo "NVT equilibration..."
gmx grompp -f nvt.mdp -c em.gro -p topol.top -o nvt.tpr
gmx mdrun -deffnm nvt -v -c nvt.gro

echo "NPT equilibration..."
gmx grompp -f npt.mdp -c nvt.gro -p topol.top -o npt.tpr
gmx mdrun -deffnm npt -v -c npt.gro

echo "Production MD run..."
gmx grompp -f md.mdp -c npt.gro -p topol.top -o md.tpr
gmx mdrun -deffnm md -v -c md.gro

echo "Analysis..."
echo '1 1' | gmx rms -f md.xtc -s md.tpr -o rmsd.xvg

echo "MD simulation completed"

#!/bin/bash
#SBATCH --job-name=hmmscan
#SBATCH --ntasks=1
#SBATCH --cpus-per-task=8
#SBATCH --mem=16G
#SBATCH --time=00:45:00
#SBATCH --partition=cpu

module load CESGA/2023
module load hmmer/3.3.2

cat > protein.fasta << 'EOF'
>kinase_query
MSVAGFDVKKRYGGGFKPYQLDHIGGINGNRGSQDPLAQVKGNTYLVLVDVGTIYMHSHP
TSGHQRLRPHKKEIKPSHPSVVSPVVKLKPK
EOF

hmmscan --cpu 8 -o domains.txt --tblout domains.tbl /databases/Pfam-A.hmm protein.fasta

echo "HMMER scan completed"

#!/bin/bash
set -e
#SBATCH --job-name=protein_pipeline
#SBATCH --ntasks=1
#SBATCH --cpus-per-task=16
#SBATCH --mem=64G
#SBATCH --time=06:00:00
#SBATCH --partition=gpu
#SBATCH --gres=gpu:1

module load CESGA/2023
module load python/3.11
module load ncbi-toolkit/2.14.0
module load hmmer/3.3.2

echo "===== Protein Analysis Pipeline ====="
echo "Started: $(date)"

INPUT="input_protein.fasta"
cat > ${INPUT} << 'EOF'
>unknown_sequence
MVLSPADKTNVKAAVDVWFEASPMFRAVFDAKYVMVQVSKLSQKFHVQDNCNLLLKVTKI
AYSVLSALRQQLQVKGHGVQVGIVGAKVQA
EOF

echo "[Step 1/4] BLAST homology search..."
blastp -query ${INPUT} -db /databases/swissprot -num_threads 16 -evalue 1e-5 -outfmt '6' -out blast_results.txt

echo "[Step 2/4] Domain identification..."
hmmscan --cpu 16 -o domains.txt /databases/Pfam-A.hmm ${INPUT}

echo "[Step 3/4] Secondary structure prediction..."
python << 'PYTHON'
print('Secondary structure prediction running...')
print('Alpha-helix: 45%')
print('Beta-sheet: 25%')
print('Coil: 30%')
PYTHON

echo "[Step 4/4] Summary report..."
echo "Pipeline completed successfully at $(date)"

curl_examples.description: How to submit scripts to the API using curl

response.message: Script validated and queued for processing

python_example.code:
import requests

script = '''#!/bin/bash
#SBATCH --job-name=blast_search
...
'''

payload = {
    'job_name': 'blast_search',
    'job_type': 'COMPUTE',
    'script_type': 'BLAST',
    'script_content': script,
    'resources': {
        'cpus': 16,
        'gpus': 0,
        'memory_gb': 32,
        'wall_time_hours': 1.5
    }
}

response = requests.post(
    'http://localhost:8000/api/v1/jobs',
    json=payload
)

print(response.json())
